# volcenginecc_transitrouter_route_table_propagation (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::TransitRouter::RouteTablePropagation



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `creation_time` (String) Route learning creation time.
- `status` (String) Route learning status. Available: Available. Creating: Creating. Pending: Pending. Deleting: Deleting.
- `transit_router_attachment_id` (String) ID of the network instance connection.
- `transit_router_route_table_id` (String) ID of the route table associated with the transit router instance.
